EmailTemplate.name: ARRH - Placement Details
EmailTemplate.subject: Placement Orientation | Alliance Rural & Remote Health
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
PLACEMENT DETAILS.
Hi {!Contact.FirstName},
It's time to get ready for your next Rural & Remote adventure!
This email contains all the details you need successfully start your {!TR1__Job__c.Name} contract
Please review all the below details carefully and let us know if you have any questions.
[Roster details] [Travel details] [Accomodation details] [Paper timesheet] [On-call addendum]
Remember you can always call us on 07 4998 5550 if you want to speak to a consultant directly.
Kind regards, Your team at Alliance Rural & Remote Health
